studies.title:
Implementation of a digital nurse to improve the use of digital health applications for older people with depressive disorders (DiGA4Aged) -
A randomized proof of concept study.

_verification.reason: The study mentions 'Selfapys Online-Kurs für Depressionen' as one of the two DiGAs approved for treating depressive disorders, specifically in the context of the intervention being studied. This indicates that the study is specifically about this digital therapeutic product.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a 'randomized proof of concept study' with participants allocated to an intervention group receiving support from a 'Digital Nurse' and a control group receiving standard information, indicating a randomized controlled trial design.
